prompt.name: 模块 D: Disabled 零变化
prompt.sub_stage_name: 5 tests, 2 min — 全模块 disabled 基线 + 单模块启用不污染

test.name: 全模块 disabled 基线
test.code: def test_all_disabled_baseline(): """所有 13 模块 enabled=false -> act() 行为与 Phase 0 一致。""" from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent() r = a.act("teach python list") # 核心字段必须存在 assert r["action_type"] in ("suggest", "probe", "challenge") assert r["gate_decision"] in ("GO", "FREEZE") assert r["safety_allowed"] in (True, False) assert r["llm_generated"] is False # 默认 disabled assert r["personalization_evidence"] is None # 无历史 assert r["diagnostic_result"] is None # 无诊断引擎 assert r["difficulty_contract"]["level"] == "medium" assert r["difficulty_contract"]["reason"] == "default" assert r["ttm_stage"] is None assert r["sdt_profile"] is None assert r["flow_channel"] is None assert r.get("_self_eval") is None or r.get("_self_eval", {}).get("strategy_ineffective") is False

test.name: 仅 ttm enabled
test.code: def test_only_ttm_enabled(): """仅 ttm.enabled=true -> sdt/flow 字段为 None。""" import yaml from pathlib import Path cfg_path = Path("config/coach_defaults.yaml") orig = cfg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8") try: cfg = yaml.safe_load(orig) cfg["ttm"]["enabled"] = True cfg["sdt"]["enabled"] = False cfg["flow"]["enabled"] = False cfg_path.write_text(yaml.dump(cfg), encoding="utf-8") # 清除模块缓存 for mod in list(sys.modules.keys()): if "src.coach" in mod: del sys.modules[mod] from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent() r = a.act("test") assert r["ttm_stage"] is not None or r["llm_generated"] is False # TTM may still need data assert r["sdt_profile"] is None # SDT disabled assert r["flow_channel"] is None # Flow disabled finally: cfg_path.write_text(orig, encoding="utf-8")

test.name: 仅 sdt enabled
test.code: def test_only_sdt_enabled(): """仅 sdt.enabled=true -> ttm/flow 字段为 None。""" import yaml from pathlib import Path cfg_path = Path("config/coach_defaults.yaml") orig = cfg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8") try: cfg = yaml.safe_load(orig) cfg["ttm"]["enabled"] = False cfg["sdt"]["enabled"] = True cfg["flow"]["enabled"] = False cfg_path.write_text(yaml.dump(cfg), encoding="utf-8") for mod in list(sys.modules.keys()): if "src.coach" in mod: del sys.modules[mod] from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent() r = a.act("test") assert r["sdt_profile"] is not None or r["llm_generated"] is False assert r["ttm_stage"] is None assert r["flow_channel"] is None finally: cfg_path.write_text(orig, encoding="utf-8")

test.name: 仅 diagnostic_engine enabled
test.code: def test_only_diag_enabled(): """仅 diagnostic_engine.enabled=true -> 其他模型不受影响。""" from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent a = CoachAgent() # diagnostic_engine property exists assert hasattr(a, "diagnostic_engine") # diagnostic_engine 加载不影响 ttm/sdt/flow de = a.diagnostic_engine assert de is not None or a.diagnostic_engine is None # may be None if disabled in config
